title: Meeting Room Finder
description: Match meeting requests to the smallest available room that fits

parts.title: Find best room for each request
parts.description: A coworking space has meeting rooms of different capacities. Some rooms already have bookings. Implement findRooms(rooms, bookings, requests) that takes an array of room objects (each with an id and capacity), an array of existing booking objects (each with a roomId, start time, and end time), and an array of request objects (each with a start time, end time, and minimum capacity needed). For each request, return the id of the smallest-capacity room that meets the minimum capacity and is not booked during the requested time window. Two time windows conflict if one starts before the other ends and ends after the other starts. If no room is available, return null. Return the results as an array in the same order as the requests. Each request is evaluated independently against the original bookings only.
activeTests: returns null when no room has enough capacity
skips booked rooms during requested time
empty bookings assigns first fitting room
